description: Routing accuracy eval for the mindframes router. Each query is labeled with the set of acceptable sub-skill routes. Queries with multiple entries in 'expected' are deliberately ambiguous; any listed answer scores as correct.

cases.query: Should we migrate our session store from Redis to Postgres, or keep Redis and add persistence?
Review this proposal to consolidate our six services into a monorepo.
Compare LangGraph versus a hand-rolled state machine for our agent orchestration layer.
Was moving our CI to self-hosted runners the right call? I want a retrospective.
Which of these three observability vendors should we pick? We haven't used any of them yet.
cases.note: greenfield evaluate — the old routing table had no row for this

cases.query: What are the trade-offs between feature-flagging this rollout versus a canary deploy?
My team wants to rewrite the frontend in Svelte. Play devil's advocate on this plan.
Our p99 latency doubled overnight and no deploys went out. Figure out why.
Users in the EU region see stale data but US users don't. What's going on?
How did this feature flag end up enabled in prod when the config repo says it's off?
Walk me through migrating this service from REST to gRPC — what's the path from where we are to where we need to be?
The nightly batch job reports success but the totals don't match the source data. Diagnose this.
Why does the container OOM under load tests but never in production?
Help with the postmortem: what's the root cause chain for yesterday's outage?
Improve our onboarding flow — it currently takes users 12 steps to reach first value.
This retry logic works but it's fragile and hard to follow. Redesign it.
We want more thorough input validation, but it's slowing the pipeline down. Resolve that tension.
cases.note: explicit contradiction — should hit contradiction-resolution mode

cases.query: Here's our CLI's current help output. Iterate on the UX.
Make our standup format better — right now it's 25 minutes of status reading.
What if we changed our caching layer from write-back to write-through? Explore variations on the current design.
Brainstorm theme ideas for our internal hackathon.
I don't know where to start with adding memory to our agents. Map out the possibility space.
What are our options for monetizing this open-source project? Nothing's decided yet.
We're building a developer portal from scratch — nothing exists today. Generate design directions.
Ideate as many approaches as possible for reducing our cloud spend.
We have a vague mandate to 'improve developer experience.' Where do we even begin?
Our deploys keep failing and I'm not sure whether we should fix the pipeline or replace it entirely.
cases.note: diagnose-first or decide-first are both defensible

cases.query: Think through our testing strategy systematically.
The search feature is bad. Do something about it.
Help me rethink how we do code reviews.
